contentBlocks.original:
गुरुर्ब्रह्मा गुरुर्विष्णुः गुरुर्देवो महेश्वरः
गुरुः साक्षात् परब्रह्म तस्मै श्री गुरवे नमः
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gururbrahmā gururviṣṇuḥ gururdevo maheśvaraḥ
guruḥ sākṣāt parabrahma tasmai śrī gurave namaḥ
contentBlocks.translation: The Guru is Brahmā, the Guru is Vishnu, the Guru is Maheśvara (Shiva). The Guru is verily the Supreme Brahman. Salutations to that revered Guru.
contentBlocks.meanings: गुरुः (guruḥ) – the Guru; ब्रह्मा (brahmā) – Brahmā; गुरुः (guruḥ) – the Guru; विष्णुः (viṣṇuḥ) – Vishnu; गुरुः (guruḥ) – the Guru; देवः (devaḥ) – god; महेश्वरः (maheśvaraḥ) – Maheśvara (Shiva); गुरुः (guruḥ) – the Guru; साक्षात् (sākṣāt) – directly; परब्रह्म (parabrahma) – Supreme Brahman (para:supreme | brahma:Brahman); तस्मै (tasmai) – to that; श्री (śrī) – revered; गुरवे (gurave) – to the Guru; नमः (namaḥ) – salutations;
